title: Intensely Umami German Sausages Skillet
description: A hearty German dish featuring tender sausages, dried chillies, and a rich umami flavor, perfect for a hangover cure or a satisfying meal. This kosher-friendly recipe uses air-frying for a crispy exterior and a juicy interior.

ingredients.name: dried chillies
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1 teaspoon dried chilli flakes

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the sausages and cook them in the air fryer for 5 minutes, then set aside.
Add the sliced onions to the air fryer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced mushrooms, minced garlic, crushed dried chillies, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the air fryer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, whisk together the beef broth and tomato paste.
Add the cooked sausages back to the air fryer and pour in the beef broth mixture.
Stir everything together and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the sausages and vegetables hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
